{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Drake
| introduced = Ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] pulled the [[Drake]] the last few feet.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15">''Ghostwater'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
